0.details:
nature of offence
time it was committed
why I am sorry
Pledge not to repeat the offence
Say how my actions affected the relevant people
Make reparations on the wrongs I have done
0.model_generation:
Dear Team,

I want to apologize for submitting the quarterly project report two weeks late last Friday. I know my delay disrupted our workflow and caused extra stress for each of you. When I failed to communicate the challenges I was facing, our meeting agendas suffered and the follow-up tasks piled up unfairly on everyone.

I am sincerely sorry for not upholding my responsibility and for letting the team down. Going forward, I will set earlier personal deadlines, send regular progress updates and seek help immediately if obstacles arise. I pledge to prioritize clear communication and timely delivery to prevent a repeat of this mistake.

To make amends, I have completed an updated report and scheduled a review session tomorrow. I will stay late this week to help anyone catch up.

Thank you for your patience and trust as I work to rebuild your confidence in me.
0.final_version:
Dear Team,

I hereby take this opportunity to apologize for my unwarranted submission of  the quarterly project report two weeks late last Friday. I am well awareof how my delay disrupted our workflow and laid an unprecendented work load and extra stress for each of you. My failure to timely communicate the challenges I was undergoing in our meeting agendas caused a severe bottle neck and the follow-up tasks piled up unfairly on everyone. I understand most of you had to work extra hours to make up for lost time and beat the tight deadline

I offer my deepest apology to all of you for not upholding my responsibility and for letting the team down. From today onwards I have resolved to set earlier personal deadlines, send timely progress updates  and seek help and assistance promptly, if I encounter any challenges arise.I will always communicate clearly and on time to prevent a repeat of the same

To show the sincerity in my apology, I have completed an updated report and scheduled a review session tomorrow. I will stay late this week to help anyone catch up and work on Saturday to compile the entire report for the week.

I truly appreciate your patience and will dedicate myself inrebuilding your confidence in me and the nature of my work. I hope you find it in your hearts to forgive me and in future look past my mistakes.

edits.removed: I pledge to prioritize clear communication and timely delivery to prevent a repeat of this mistake.

likert.edit_type_other: Adding additional information, a reparation statement

1.details:
Mention the event or scenario to which I am grateful
Mention the date and time of the event
Specify how the friend specifically helped me out
Appreciate the friend for going out of his way to helping me
1.model_generation:
Dear Alex,

I am writing to thank you for your incredible support during my apartment move on Saturday, August 12, at 2:00 PM. Your help packing boxes, loading the moving truck, and assembling furniture made the entire process smooth and stress-free. Your calm positivity and sense of humor kept my spirits high as we tackled the heaviest boxes. I especially appreciate how you stayed late to ensure everything was in place before you headed home.

Your thoughtfulness in bringing snacks and coordinating the rental truck showed how much you cared about making the day easier for me. I know rearranging your weekend plans wasn’t simple, yet you did it without hesitation. Having a friend like you who steps up when it matters most is truly a gift. Please know how much I value your generosity, enthusiasm, and hard work. Thank you for going out of your way to help me—it meant more than words can say.

Sincerely,
David
1.final_version:
Dear Alex,

I am writing to thank you for your incredible support during my apartment move on Saturday, August 12, at 2:00 PM. Your help packing boxes, loading the moving truck, and assembling furniture made the entire process smooth and stress-free. You went out of your way committing to your resources and valuable time. In addition, your generous simle, easy going nature and sense of humor kept my spirits high as we tackled the heaviest boxes and survuved the tumble down the stairs. I especially appreciate how you stayed late to ensure everything was in place before you headed home.

Your thoughtfulness in bringing snacks and coordinating the rental truck showed how much you cared about making the day easier for me. I know rearranging your weekend plans wasn’t simple, yet you did it without hesitation. Having a friend like you who steps up when it matters most is truly a gift. Please know how much I value your generosity, enthusiasm, and hard work. Thank you for going out of your way to help me—it meant more than words can say. Please know you can always rely on me to help you out whenever you need and never hesitate to call on me.

Sincerely,
David

likert.edit_type_other: Adding humour, pledging to return the favour

2.details:
Introduce myself, thank everyone for coming, make a nice kind comment about how good the food was
Talk of my relationship with the birthday celebrant, and how we met, know each other
Share a joke about a time we exprience together
Raise a glass to the celebrant, for good health, family and prosperity
2.model_generation:
Good evening everyone. I’m honored to be here as his oldest friend. Thank you all for coming to celebrate this special day. And I have to say, the food is absolutely delicious – already my third plate!

I still remember how we first met in freshman orientation, bonding over our mutual love of terrible dad jokes and late-night pizza runs. Since then, I’ve watched you grow into the kind, generous person you are today. Your kindness and unwavering support have meant the world to me and to everyone lucky enough to know you. Like the time we got hopelessly lost on that road trip and you insisted we follow the GPS dog feature... I’ll never forget you asking him for directions!

Tonight, we raise our glasses to you: here’s to your health, to laughter-filled days, to the warmth of family, and to prosperity in every adventure ahead. Cheers!
2.final_version:
Good evening everyone. Thank you all for taking time of your tight weekend schedule to be here today to celebrate our friend and welcoming him officially to the fourth floor.  I am thankful and feel honored to be here as his oldest friend and be granted this opportunity to address you all. Thank you all for coming to celebrate this special day. And I have to say, the food is absolutely delicious – already my third plate!

I still remember how we first met in freshman orientation, bonding over our mutual love of terrible dad jokes and late-night pizza runs. He was also the first person to bail me out of the college cell when i was wrongly accused of being disorderly after celebrating our football game win. Since then, I’ve watched you grow into the kind, generous person you are today. Your kindness and unwavering support have meant the world to me and to everyone lucky enough to know you. Like the time we got hopelessly lost on that road trip and you insisted we follow the GPS dog feature... I’ll never forget you asking him for directions! I was 100% sure we would never get back to civilization in time for our graduation.

Tonight, we raise our glasses to you: here’s to your health, to laughter-filled days, to the warmth of family, and to prosperity in every adventure ahead. Cheers!

3.details:
Great them kindly and hope they are doing well
Pledge your support and inform them of your availability any time you need them
Offer to run errands for them, mention any way i might have helped them without their knowing
Inform them to call you in need, and ask if it's Ok to visit them when thay are available
3.model_generation: Hey there! I hope you’re doing well and finding moments of peace amid everything going on. I understand things can feel overwhelming, but I believe in your strength and resilience more than you know. I want you to know you’re not alone—I’m here for you whenever you need support, day or night. If you ever need someone to talk to, a listening ear, or just some company, please don’t hesitate to call. I’d also be happy to run errands—groceries, prescriptions, grabbing coffee, or walking your dog—anything to lighten your load. You might not have noticed, but I’ve already dropped off fresh batteries for your flashlight and stocked up on your favorite snacks at your door. If it’s okay, let me know a good time to visit, even if it’s just for a quick chat over tea. Take care of yourself, and remember I’m always just a phone call away, ready to help in any way I can.
3.final_version: Hey there! I hope you’re doing well and finding moments of peace amid everything going on. I understand things can feel overwhelming, but I believe in your strength and resilience more than you know. I have known you as a fighter, and I believe you will pull through.I want you to know you’re not alone—I’m here for you whenever you need support, day or night. If you ever need someone to talk to, a listening ear, or just some company, please don’t hesitate to call. I’d also be happy to run errands—groceries, prescriptions, grabbing coffee, or walking your dog—anything to lighten your load. You might not have noticed, but I’ve already dropped off fresh batteries for your flashlight and stocked up on your favorite snacks at your door. I also adjusted the sprinkler timer to ensure it does not flood the garden and porch. If it’s okay, let me know a good time to visit, even if it’s just for a quick chat over tea. Take care of yourself, and remember I’m always just a phone call away, ready to help in any way I can.

4.details:
Introduce myself, thank everyone for coming
Speak directly to the immediate family, offer my condolences
Talk of my relationship with the deceased, and mention their good deeds which i personally witnessed
Remind everyone to live their lives well, and leave a legacy, like the deceased
Bid everyone farewell, acknowledge the family once again
4.model_generation:
Hello everyone. I’m Emma Lewis, and I’m honored you’ve gathered today to celebrate the life of John Davis. Thank you all for coming and for your support. Many of you experienced his warm smile and generous spirit.

Maria, Carlos, and the Davis family, please accept my deepest condolences. My heart is with you in this time of loss.

John and I met twenty years ago volunteering at the community center. His kindness and unwavering generosity shone through, especially when he organized a holiday meal for neighbors struggling to make ends meet, ensuring no one went hungry. His compassion was a gift to us all.

Let us honor John by living with the same courage and kindness and by building our own legacies of love and service.

Farewell, dear friend. Thank you again for being here, and to the Davis family, you are forever in our hearts.
4.final_version: Hallo everyone, my name is Joe, and I thank you all for coming here to join us in biding farewell to our friend and brother John. To John's wife, Milly and their two children, Grace and Maureen, my sincere condolences. I knew John since we started woking together three years ago, and even though he was my senoir, he was always kind, helpful and considerate. He helped me and my family alot last year when I was involved in a car accident and he was instrumental in my recovery and re-integration back to work. Let us all remember that our time on this earth is limited and we should strive to always do good, be kind to others and provide our support, no matter how little, so that we may leave a legacy like our friend John. Once gain, thank you all for coming today, and to the family, our prayers and our support will always be available to you. Please do not hesitate to reach us, and if you do not mind we will be checking on you regularly since John was a brother figure to us all.

5.details:
Greet my old friend, and say I hope he has been well
Declare that I am doing good as well, sumarize on our last meeting together
Ask about them in detail, their work, family and progress in life
Update them on my work, family and progress in life as well
Indicate on my wish that we should meet in person soon, suggest an open date and venue, ask if it's Ok with them
Bid them farewell. encourage them to keep in touch,pledge to keep in touch as well
5.model_generation:
Hey there,

I hope you’ve been well. I’m doing great too; I still smile thinking back to our last meeting at the lakeside cabin last summer—it was such a blast.

How have you been? How’s work going—did you finally wrap up that big project? How’s the family? I’d love to catch up on everything you’ve been up to, from career milestones to weekend adventures.

As for me, work has been busy but rewarding: I just finished a major campaign that’s already generating buzz. At home, the kids are thriving in school, and we’ve started a small vegetable garden. Life feels full and exciting.

I’d love to meet up in person soon—how about next Saturday afternoon at our favorite café downtown? Let me know if that works for you.

Take care, and let’s keep in touch—I promise to reach out again soon.

Cheers,
Your friend
5.final_version:
Hey Mike, how you doing, hope you;ve been well ma. It's been ages since we last met at your farewell party. I hope you, Mary and the kids are doing well, they must be really big by now. I am doing great as well, my wife and children are well too, and they ask of you and send their regards. Are you still working in the cement industry or you changed jobs? I moved to food and beverage industry and was finally able to start my own auto-shop as well. I miss the business ideas we used to brainstorm together man, hope you we able to get into construction, like you always wanted. My annual leave is due next month and I was wondering If I could drop by and check on you before my family and I leave for holiday. Please inform me if the first week of November works for you or an alternative date. Let's be keeping in touch man, I have more free time nowadays, we should catch up. Otherwise, cheers man and all the best for you and your family.
Yours,
Dave
